items.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
items.summary: Meta told Dylan Byers, of Puck News, that it had nixed the feature after backlash from its user base.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI, alleging trade secret theft in blockbuster Big Tech battle
items.summary: Apple sued OpenAI, alleging the AI company stole trade secrets from former employees to accelerate its push into AI-powered hardware. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: OpenAI responds to Apple's trade secret theft lawsuit
items.summary: OpenAI has issued a formal statement in response to Apple's lawsuit accusing the company of trade secret theft. Read it below.

items.title: UNIGRID's sodium-ion home battery debuts in Europe, US is next

items.title: iOS 27: What's New With the Mail App
items.summary: Apple's Mail app is getting some useful updates in iOS 27 , with Apple making big improvements to search and introducing new AI features. Search ‌iOS 27‌ has an overhauled search system that extends to the Mail app. Instead of surfacing...

items.title: Two Apple Stores in U.S. Are Moving Soon
items.summary: Two of Apple's retail stores in the U.S. will be relocating later this month, although they will only be a short distance from their existing locations. Apple Renaissance at Colony Park Apple Queens Center in Elmhurst, New York is moving...

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged theft of trade secrets - claims company mentored incoming employees on bringing confidential information
items.summary: Apple sued OpenAI, including its own former employees, over the theft of trade secrets as both companies build up AI hardware businesses.

items.title: Apple sues OpenAI & previous VP of product design over mass IP theft
